title: Craftable Gunpowder
description: Craft gunpowder with sand, charcoal and magma blocks (1.20+) or potent sulfur, bone meal and charcoal (26.2+).
body:
This is a standalone pack containing the gunpowder crafting recipe from [Craftable Vegan Hostile Mob Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vegan-hostile-mob-drops). 

Use sand, two charcoal and a magma block to craft four gunpowder.

**NEW for 26.2+!** Use potent sulfur, six bone meal and two charcoal to craft nine gunpowder.

_Issues? Please report them on the [Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/craftable-gunpowder-1-20-1-21/) or [Github](https://github.com/not-blue/craftable-gunpowder/issues)._
